title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0894
summary: 1 The principal and decisive issue before us is whether there was a basis in fact for denying Dickinson's claim to a ministerial exemption under § 6(g) of the Universal Military Training and Service Act, 62 Stat. 611, 50 U.S.C.Appendix, § 456(g), 50 U.S.C.A.Appendix, § 456(g).1 After the selectiv...
